shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books every day.
My favorite meal is breakfast with pancakes.
I like to walk in the park after work.
Traveling to new places is always exciting to me.
I often listen to music while studying at home.
Cooking dinner with my family is a fun activity.
Watching movies on weekends helps me relax and unwind.
Exploring new hobbies can lead to interesting experiences.
I believe that volunteering can have a positive impact on the community.
Maintaining a balanced lifestyle is important for overall well-being.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel planning.
questions: Q1: Can you describe a memorable trip you have taken?
Q2: What challenges do you face when planning a trip?
Q3: How do you feel about solo travel compared to group travel?
Q4: What advice would you give someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about learning methods.
questions: Q1: What is your favorite way to learn something new?
Q2: Have you ever struggled with a particular subject? What happened?
Q3: In your opinion, which learning method is the most effective?
Q4: What tips would you recommend to someone looking to improve their study habits?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What types of exercise do you enjoy the most?
Q2: What obstacles do you encounter when trying to stay active?
Q3: How important do you think exercise is for mental health?
Q4: What suggestions would you give to someone who wants to start exercising regularly?
